role: This directory defines the architectural and coding standards for the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: Collectively, these files establish the layered architecture model (CLI, services, core, tasks, engines, infra) with boundary and dependency constraints, and define naming conventions (interface prefixes, test file suffixes) with severity levels and rationale to ensure codebase consistency.

children.role: Architectural constraint specification for the ArchSpine project's layered architecture
Defines naming conventions and coding standards for the ArchSpine monorepo codebase.
